shell.headline: Prevent the costly mistake of hiring a proxy candidate
shell.description: Build the integrity dossier before the offer letter - EU-sovereign CV, transcript, and profile cross-checks with cited flags, not automated verdicts.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox

verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A new verification link has been sent.
